atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain on the inside of his knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he was playing basketball.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports Jerry ran into him.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is ecchymosis on the inside of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is swelling on the inside of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is fluid in the knee (effusion).

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation reveals tenderness on the medial aspect of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports decreased range of motion in his right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with palpation of the medial aspect of the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes 500mg of metformin twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient checks his blood sugars every morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking some nonsteroidal medications, such as Advil or Motrin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician provides a right knee brace

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician sends the patient to physical therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to discontinue any nonsteroidal medications

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in seven days

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports monitoring his blood sugars daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to contact his PCP if blood sugars increase significantly

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician arranges for an assistant to provide discharge instructions

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment
